## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 -c "from main import app; print('OK')"` passes
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys or credentials
- [ ] No new external database dependencies (SQLite only)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if a new env var was added
- [ ] Existing behaviour preserved (no unintended regressions)
